title: PortableNote Manifest
description: Vault identity, spec version, format declaration, and checksum.

vault_id.description: Permanent vault identity. UUID v4. Never changes.

spec_version.description: PortableNote spec version this vault conforms to. Semver.

format.description: Content format for all blocks in this vault. 'markdown' for v0.

checksum.description: SHA-256 over canonical serialization of all source artifacts. Prefixed 'sha256:'.
